traces: BF-07 acceptance 3 (citation precision = 1.0; every span's (resourceId, jsonPath) re-resolves against canonical fhir_resources to a value equal to the span's projected value)
BF-07 acceptance 4 (audit-on-read; every span.auditHash == the CcpProjection row_hash, the reason carries the content digest, and mutating the source value or the audit row is detected as a mismatch)
BF-07 acceptance 8 (scope-after-retrieve + cross-tenant-leak; a forged foreign id / denied type / laundered receipt never materializes a span, fails closed count-only, single fhir_resources read)
BF-07 acceptance 7 (CCP serialization >= 1.4x leaner than compact JSON of the identical span set under the named o200k tokenizer, fully offline, zero fetch)
BF-07 acceptance 5 (groups emitted in the documented U-shape of the search rank order, deterministically)
BF-07 acceptance 1 (buildCcp returns a Result; malformed input -> typed MALFORMED_INPUT err with zero reads, never a throw at the boundary)
BF-07 panel finding A (serializer injection; a hostile excludedByPolicy reason / header cannot forge a group or span line, and doc.text inverts losslessly back to the exact span set)
